item.title: 曝 WWDC26「藏」了三项功能，折叠屏与触控屏 Mac 代码已就位
item.guid: 曝-WWDC26「藏」了三项功能，折叠屏与触控屏-Mac-代码已就位
item.description:
Bloomberg reporter Mark Gurman revealed yesterday that Apple has several features that have completed development but were not announced at the recent WWDC26, and code evidence for a foldable iPhone and a touchscreen MacBook has already appeared in the first developer beta of iOS 27. 彭博社记者 Mark Gurman 在昨日发文披露，苹果有多项已完成开发的功能并未在日前的 WWDC26 上对外公布，并且 iOS 27 首个开发者测试版中也已出现折叠屏 iPhone 与触控屏 MacBook 的代码证据。

    New Apple Watch face "Modular";

    Camera App with customizable control interface;

    An open framework "Extensions" that supports third-party AI models connecting to Siri — Apple has discussed integration details with OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google, and related settings panels and App Store sections are already built into the beta version, shielded by a backend switch.

Gurman believes the reasons for not disclosing the extensions include: EU regulatory pressure, avoiding overshadowing the launch of the new Siri, potential legal friction with OpenAI, and already complex external communication. He expects the feature to go live at some point in the future. Gurman 认为扩展未公开的原因包括：欧盟监管压力、避免盖过新版 Siri 的发布声量、与 OpenAI 之间的潜在法律摩擦，以及对外沟通已足够复杂。他预计该功能将在未来某个时间点上线。

He also stated on X that, in the long run, Apple might develop its own "OpenClaw competitor" to create an agent system capable of directly operating iPhones, iPads, and Macs. 他还在 X 上表示，从长远来看，苹果可能会开发自己的「OpenClaw 竞争对手」，打造一套能直接操作 iPhone、iPad 和 Mac 的智能体系统。

Additionally, the beta code also revealed signs of two new products: 另外，测试版代码还透露了两款新品的迹象：

    Foldable iPhone: iPhone Mirroring supports widescreen iPad-style layout, the system can detect the device's folding angle, and there are references to multi-screen devices;

    Touchscreen MacBook: New pull-to-refresh gesture, Sidecar supports full touch input, and the Mac version of Siri interface adopts a capsule shape similar to Dynamic Island.

Gurman previously reported that the foldable iPhone (internal codename V68) is expected to be released in September this year, and the high-end touchscreen MacBook (codenames K114/K116) is expected to be launched from late this year to early next year. Gurman 此前报道称，折叠屏 iPhone（内部代号 V68）预计今年 9 月发布，触控高端 MacBook（代号 K114/K116）预计于今年底至明年初推出。

item.title: 阿里巴巴：「周靖人离职」为谣言
item.guid: 阿里巴巴：「周靖人离职」为谣言
item.description:
According to Yicai, Alibaba Group responded yesterday, stating that "Zhou Jingren's resignation" is purely a rumor. Alibaba said it has noticed that some people have been organizing the spread of this rumor online in recent days and urged not to disseminate false information. 据第一财经报道，阿里巴巴集团昨日回应称，「周靖人辞职」纯属谣言。阿里方面表示，已注意到近几日有人在网络上组织扩散该谣言，并呼吁不要传播不实信息。

Zhou Jingren was previously appointed as Alibaba's Chief Scientist on June 8, leading the establishment of the AI Future Research Institute. This appointment was less than a week before this rumor debunking. 周靖人此前在 6 月 8 日被任命为阿里巴巴首席科学家，牵头成立 AI 未来研究院。这一任命距本次辟谣不到一周。

item.title: 百度疑似降低 AI 搜索结果权重，网页链接重新前置
item.guid: 百度疑似降低-AI-搜索结果权重，网页链接重新前置
item.description:
According to Bianews, Baidu Search has allegedly adjusted the weight of AI results, with natural web results for some search terms now ranking before AI integrated results. 据鞭牛士报道，百度搜索疑似对 AI 结果权重作出调整，部分搜索词的自然网页结果重新排在 AI 综合结果之前。

The report mentioned that when searching for terms like "Brazil" or "how to go to Beijing," the AI result box no longer occupies the first position on the first screen in most cases. 报道提到，搜索「巴西」或「如何去北京」等词时，AI 结果框多数不再占据首屏第一位置。

item.title: 员工烧 Token 太猛，曝 Meta 开始限制 AI 用量
item.guid: 员工烧-Token-太猛，曝-Meta-开始限制-AI-用量
item.description:
According to The Information, Meta issued an internal memo to approximately 6,000 employees on Tuesday, announcing restrictions on employee AI usage to curb the continuous rise in internal AI costs. 据 The Information 报道，Meta 于本周二向约 6000 名员工发布内部备忘录，宣布将对员工的 AI 使用量实施限制，以遏制内部 AI 成本持续攀升的势头。

The memo shows that Meta employees consumed a cumulative 60.2 trillion tokens in the past approximately 30 days, after which usage further climbed to 73.7 trillion tokens before the internal leaderboard was taken offline. The company expects internal AI usage spending to reach billions of dollars this year. 备忘录显示，Meta 员工在过去约 30 天内累计消耗了 60.2 万亿 Tokens，此后使用量进一步攀升至 73.7 万亿 Tokens，随后内部排行榜才被下线。公司预计，今年内部 AI 使用支出将达数十亿美元。

We are seeing exponential growth in AI usage, with internal use alone projected to reach billions of dollars in spending this year.

To address this situation, Meta is building an internal platform called AI Gateway to track AI usage and spending across teams in real-time, and to set up an automatic alert mechanism for timely intervention when abnormal consumption peaks occur. 为应对这一局面，Meta 正在构建一套名为 AI Gateway 的内部平台，用于实时追踪各团队的 AI 使用量与支出，并设置自动预警机制，以便在出现异常消费峰值时及时介入。

The company also plans to introduce initial usage limits and budget caps this year, and transition to a more systematic management model next year, including strict budget allocation and tool support. 公司还计划在今年内推出初步的使用限额和预算上限，并于明年转向更系统化的管理模式，包括严格的预算分配与工具支持。

item.title: Claude Fable 5 封禁内幕曝光：遭自家股东举报，拒绝修复越狱漏洞后被封
item.guid: Claude-Fable-5-封禁内幕曝光：遭自家股东举报，拒绝修复越狱漏洞后被封
item.description:
Recently, two models, Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5, were subjected to U.S. government export controls, forcing a suspension of access for global users, and even Anthropic's internal employees with foreign nationalities were unable to use their latest models. 日前，Claude Fable 5 和 Mythos 5 两款模型遭美国政府出口管制，被迫对全球用户暂停访问，连 Anthropic 内部拥有外国国籍的员工也无法使用自家最新模型。

According to The Information, the driving force behind this outcome is Anthropic's top financier—Amazon CEO Andy Jassy. 而据 The Information 报道，推动这一结果的，正是 Anthropic 头号金主——亚马逊 CEO 安迪·贾西（Andy Jassy）。

The report states that Amazon researchers, while testing Fable 5, discovered a "jailbreak" method that could bypass security safeguards and obtain information related to cyberattacks. Jassy subsequently submitted the test results directly to senior White House officials. 报道称，亚马逊研究人员在测试 Fable 5 时，发现了可绕过安全护栏、获取网络攻击相关信息的「越狱」方法。贾西随后直接将测试结果递交白宫高层。

U.S. National Cyber Director Sean Cairncross immediately convened an emergency meeting, finalizing export controls as the most direct response, leaving Anthropic with a response window that was at one point only 90 minutes. 美国国家网络事务总监肖恩·凯恩斯克罗斯（Sean Cairncross）随即召集紧急会议，敲定出口管制为最直接应对手段，留给 Anthropic 的响应窗口一度仅有 90 分钟。

According to informed sources, the government had asked Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei to fix the vulnerability, but was refused. Anthropic officially characterized the "jailbreak" incident as a "minor discovery" and pointed out that other public models also have similar issues, but both the government and Amazon disagreed with this assessment. 据知情人士披露，政府曾要求 Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei 修复漏洞，但遭拒绝。Anthropic 官方将涉事越狱案例定性为「轻微发现」，并指出其他公开模型同样存在类似问题，但政府与亚马逊均不认同这一说法。

Amazon has cumulatively invested $13 billion in Anthropic since 2023 and plans to add up to $20 billion more. Sources close to the U.S. government stated that it is unlikely this export control will extend to other AI companies. 亚马逊自 2023 年以来已向 Anthropic 累计投资 130 亿美元，并计划追加最高 200 亿美元。接近美国政府的人士表示，此次出口管制不太可能扩展至其他 AI 公司。

Meanwhile, Zhipu recently announced that GLM-5.2 is now available to all GLM Coding Plan users, covering Lite, Pro, Max, and Team editions. 与此同时，智谱日前宣布，GLM-5.2 面向 GLM Coding Plan 全量用户开放，覆盖 Lite、Pro、Max 和团队版。

Zhipu stated that cutting-edge intelligence should not belong only to a few, nor should it be arbitrarily withdrawn by a few rules. It should be open, accessible, buildable, and serve every developer. 智谱表示，前沿智能不应只属于少数人，也不应被少数规则随时收回。它应该开放、可用、可构建，并服务于每一位开发者。

item.title: 外媒曝蚂蚁集团秘密测试 AI 版支付宝
item.guid: 外媒曝蚂蚁集团秘密测试-AI-版支付宝
item.description:
On the afternoon of June 14, foreign media reported that Ant Group is secretly testing an AI version of Alipay, with the new version overturning the original user interaction and allowing one-click access to a native AI interface. The report stated that the launch date for the new version is undecided. Ant Group declined to comment. 6 月 14 日下午，外媒曝蚂蚁集团正秘密测试 AI 版支付宝，新版本颠覆原有用户交互，可一键切入原生 AI 界面。消息称，新版本上线时间未定。蚂蚁集团拒绝评论。

Domestic sources say that the AI version of Alipay may be launched soon. Additionally, according to Tech Planet, a very small number of test invitation codes have been quietly distributed, initiating public beta testing. 有国内消息人士称，AI 版支付宝或将于近期上线。另据 Tech 星球报道，极少量测试邀请码已低调发出，启动公测。

"This will be an epic revamp for Alipay," said one person who got an early look at the beta version, noting that the new Alipay overturns the original user interaction interface. If the news is true, Alipay is expected to become the first AI Super App with a billion-level user base. 「这将是支付宝史诗级的改版。」一位抢先体验测试版的人士如是说，新版支付宝颠覆原有用户交互界面。若消息属实，支付宝有望成为首个 10 亿级用户的 AI 超级App。

Almost at the same time, WeChat's AI initiatives also attracted market attention. According to public information, the WeChat AI assistant is already in the internal testing phase. 几乎在同一时间节点，微信的 AI 化动向也引发市场关注。根据公开信息，微信 AI 助手已在内测阶段。

item.title: 一汽大众为速腾空调喷粉致歉并提供 15 年担保
item.guid: 一汽大众为速腾空调喷粉致歉并提供-15-年担保
item.description:
According to Sina Technology, FAW-Volkswagen has issued "A Letter to Customers" regarding the issue of white powder being sprayed from the air conditioning vents, as reported by some Sagitar owners, stating that they will provide free air conditioning system inspections. 据新浪科技报道，一汽大众已就部分速腾车主反馈的空调出风口喷出白色粉末问题发布《致客户的一封信》，称将提供免费空调系统检测。

FAW-Volkswagen stated that analysis shows the phenomenon is related to the accumulation of original hydrophilic coating liquid in some air conditioner evaporators, with the excess liquid forming white particles after drying. Third-party testing indicates that the main component of the white particles is polyvinyl alcohol. The affected vehicles are primarily some Sagitar models produced from September 2025 to January 2026. 一汽大众表示，经分析，该现象与部分空调蒸发器亲水涂层原液积存有关，多余原液干燥后形成白色颗粒。第三方机构检测显示，白色颗粒主要成分为聚乙烯醇。涉及车辆主要为 2025 年 9 月至 2026 年 1 月生产的部分速腾。

The company stated that if a problem is found during inspection, they will replace the air conditioning evaporator with a brand new original part free of charge and provide a 15-year quality guarantee for the entire air conditioning assembly. The relevant free inspection services and rights protection are valid long-term, and car owners can contact an authorized FAW-Volkswagen dealer to schedule an inspection. 公司称，如检测发现问题，将免费更换全新原厂空调蒸发器，并提供空调器总成 15 年质量担保。相关免费检修服务和权益保障长期有效，车主可联系一汽大众授权经销商预约检测。

item.title: KPMG 一份报告被指充斥 AI 幻觉内容，45 条引用中仅 5 条真实
item.guid: KPMG-一份报告被指充斥-AI-幻觉内容，45-条引用中仅-5-条真实
item.description:
According to Engadget, a report titled "Total Experience: Redefining Excellence in the Age of Agentic AI" published last October by KPMG, one of the global "Big Four" professional services and accounting firms, was found to be riddled with AI hallucination content, including false citations, fabricated cases, and incorrect attributions. 据 Engadget 报道，全球「四大」专业服务和会计事务所之一 KPMG 于去年 10 月发布的一份题为《Total Experience: Redefining Excellence in the Age of Agentic AI》的报告被发现充斥着大量 AI 幻觉内容，包括虚假引用、捏造案例及错误归因。

An investigation by AIGC content detection platform GPTZero revealed that out of 45 citations in the report, only 5 accurately pointed to real sources; 28 had their titles rewritten or had fictitious content added; and another 12 were too vague to determine their authenticity. AIGC 内容检测平台 GPTZero 的调查显示，报告中 45 条引用里，仅有 5 条准确指向真实来源；28 条对标题进行了改写或添加了虚构内容；另有 12 条表述过于模糊，无法判断其真实性。

At the level of specific facts, the investigation found that about half of the claims in the report contained false or misattributed information, which GPTZero believes "is likely due to AI research tools over-catering to the instruction to 'find real-world examples of AI agents'." 在具体事实层面，调查发现报告中约半数主张存在虚假或归因错误的问题，GPTZero 认为这「很可能是 AI 研究工具过度迎合『寻找 AI 智能体现实案例』的指令所导致的」。

Among them, the report claimed that Emirates launched a mobile chatbot named Sara, which could converse with passengers and modify flights; however, Sara is actually a mobile assistant launched in 2023 and does not have such booking modification capabilities. KPMG stated that it values content accuracy and completeness, has withdrawn the report, and is reviewing its publication process. 其中，报告称阿联酋航空推出名为 Sara 的移动聊天机器人，可与乘客对话并修改航班；但 Sara 实际是 2023 年上线的移动助手，不具备这类订票变更能力；KPMG 方面称重视内容准确性和完整性，已撤下该报告并审查发布经过。

item.title: 首尔将 AI 眼镜列入中小学期末考试违禁物品
item.guid: 首尔将-AI-眼镜列入中小学期末考试违禁物品
item.description:
According to Xinhua News Agency, the Seoul Metropolitan Office of Education in South Korea has issued a notice to primary and secondary schools and educational departments under its jurisdiction, prohibiting candidates from wearing AI smart glasses during final exams. Bringing them into the examination room will be treated as cheating. 据新华社报道，韩国首尔市教育厅已向辖区中小学校和教育部门下发通知，禁止考生佩戴 AI 智能眼镜参加期末考试，携带进入考场将按作弊处理。

The notice states that AI glasses integrate cameras, microphones, and generative AI, which could potentially transmit exam questions out of the examination room or deliver answers to users through lenses and speakers. The Seoul Metropolitan Office of Education requires schools to inform students and parents in advance and reminds invigilators to pay attention to features such as thick temples, hidden cameras, LED indicator lights, touch or physical buttons, speaker openings, and charging ports. 通知称，AI 眼镜集成摄像头、麦克风和生成式 AI，可能将考题传出考场，或通过镜片、扬声器向使用者传递答案。首尔市教育厅要求学校提前告知学生和家长，并提醒监考教师留意镜腿粗厚、隐藏摄像头、LED 指示灯、触控或实体按键、扬声器开孔和充电接口等特征。

Previously, two candidates in South Korea were found to have cheated using AI glasses in the TOEIC English proficiency test. Their scores were invalidated, and they are prohibited from retaking the TOEIC for four years. The South Korean Ministry of Education is also studying whether to specifically list rules prohibiting AI smart glasses for this November's College Scholastic Ability Test. 此前，韩国已有两名考生被查出在 TOEIC 英语能力考试中使用 AI 眼镜作弊，成绩被作废，并在 4 年内不得再次参加 TOEIC。韩国教育部也在研究是否为今年 11 月的大学修学能力考试单独列出 AI 智能眼镜禁带规则。

During the previous college entrance examinations, multiple provinces in China also successively announced that candidates entering the examination halls must cooperate with the verification of their eyeglasses. 此前的高考期间，我国多个省份亦相继宣布考生入场需配合核验框架眼镜。

item.title: 安克创新通过港交所上市聆讯，2025 年营收 305 亿元
item.guid: 安克创新通过港交所上市聆讯，2025-年营收-305-亿元
item.description:
According to Cailian Press, Anker Innovations Technology Co., Ltd. has updated its post-hearing information pack with the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, and its Hong Kong IPO has passed the listing hearing. If Anker Innovations completes its Hong Kong listing, it will form an "A+H" listing structure. 财联社消息称，安克创新科技股份有限公司已更新港交所聆讯后资料集，港股 IPO 通过上市聆讯。安克创新若完成港股上市，将形成「A+H」上市格局。

The hearing materials show that the company's revenues for 2023, 2024, and 2025 are 17.507 billion yuan, 24.710 billion yuan, and 30.514 billion yuan, respectively, with gross profit margins of 42.7%, 43.1%, and 43.9%. 聆讯材料显示，公司 2023 年、2024 年、2025 年收入分别为 175.07 亿元、247.10 亿元和 305.14 亿元，毛利率分别为 42.7%、43.1% 和 43.9%。

item.title: 启境汽车获广州 L3 级自动驾驶道路测试许可
item.guid: 启境汽车获广州-L3-级自动驾驶道路测试许可
item.description:
According to Sina Auto, Liu Jiaming, CEO of Qijing Auto, recently stated at the 2026 China Auto Chongqing Forum that Qijing has obtained an L3 autonomous driving road test permit in Guangzhou, and relevant models have already begun L3 autonomous driving pre-testing on Guangzhou roads. 据新浪汽车报道，启境汽车 CEO 刘嘉铭日前在 2026 中国汽车重庆论坛上表示，启境已拿下广州市 L3 级自动驾驶道路测试许可，相关车型已经在广州道路上展开 L3 自动驾驶预测试。

Liu Jiaming also stated that Qijing's dedicated factory has achieved an "unmanned operating system" in stages such as transfer, road testing, and pressure difference, using autonomous driving technology to improve production efficiency. Qijing is jointly built by GAC Group and Huawei Qiankun, positioned as a high-end intelligent new energy vehicle brand, and plans to equip all its models with Huawei Qiankun intelligent technology. 刘嘉铭还称，启境专属工厂在转运、道路测、压差等环节已实现「无人操作系统」，用自动驾驶技术提升生产效率。启境由广汽集团与华为乾崑联合打造，定位高端智能新能源汽车品牌，规划全系搭载华为乾崑智能技术。

item.title: 💡 蔚来李斌：车市进入最残酷决赛阶段，单点竞争已经结束
item.guid: 💡-蔚来李斌：车市进入最残酷决赛阶段，单点竞争已经结束
item.description:
According to Sina Auto, William Li, Chairman and CEO of Nio, delivered a speech at the 2026 China Auto Chongqing Forum, pointing out that the number of passenger cars in China has reached 370 million, and the automotive market has officially bid farewell to the high-growth period, fully entering a stage of inventory competition. He predicts that domestic car retail sales will decline by 15% to 20% year-on-year this year, and industry competition will enter the "most brutal final stage." 据新浪汽车报道，蔚来董事长、CEO 李斌在 2026 中国汽车重庆论坛上发表演讲指出，国内乘用车保有量已达 3.7 亿辆，汽车市场正式告别高速增量期，全面进入存量竞争阶段。他预计，今年国内汽车零售销量将同比下滑 15% 至 20%，行业竞争随之进入「最残酷的决赛阶段」。

Li Bin believes that the single-point competition model, where breakthroughs could be achieved by relying on a single technology, a popular model, or a specific feature, is now history. The industry has officially entered a comprehensive system-wide competition stage. 李斌认为，过去依靠单一技术、爆款车型或某项特色配置就能突围的单点竞争模式已成历史，如今行业正式迈入全体系综合比拼阶段。

The current market competition covers multiple dimensions such as product definition, core technology, supply chain management, manufacturing, sales and service, and brand building, testing car companies' comprehensive operational capabilities.

He also called on car companies not to engage in zero-sum game-like involution, but to break down barriers, open up cooperation, and work together in areas such as technology research and development, infrastructure, and industry standards to collectively enhance the overall industrial value. 他同时呼吁，车企之间不要进行零和博弈式内卷，应打破壁垒、开放合作，在技术研发、基础设施、行业标准等领域协同发力，合力做大整体产业价值。

Regarding Nio itself, Li Bin stated that even during its most difficult period, the company's sales could still maintain over 30% annual growth, and this year it is expected to achieve 40% to 50% growth. Additionally, Li Bin mentioned in an interview that he once predicted Nio would become profitable ten years after its establishment, taking Tesla as a role model, "wanting to be a bit faster than it, but ending up a bit behind it." 谈及蔚来自身，李斌表示公司在最难的时期销量每年仍能保持 30% 以上的增长、今年预期有机会实现 40% 至 50% 的增长。此外，李斌在采访中提到，他曾预测蔚来创建十年后会盈利，以特斯拉为学习榜样，「想比它快一点，结果还是比它落后一点」。

item.title: 豆包上线「任务模式」，扩展网页和 PPT 生成
item.guid: 豆包上线「任务模式」，扩展网页和-PPT-生成
item.description: Recently, Doubao added a task mode entry, supporting multi-round search, deep reasoning, browser operations, and web page and document report generation. It is understood that the task mode first breaks down user goals, then searches online, calls the browser, organizes results, and can generate content such as documents, reports, PPTs, and tables. 近日，豆包新增任务模式入口，支持多轮搜索、深度推理、浏览器操作，以及网页、文档报告生成。据悉，任务模式会先拆解用户目标，再联网搜索、调用浏览器并整理结果，可生成文档、报告、PPT 和表格等内容。

item.title: 扣子 3.0 上线自媒体 Skill，覆盖选题策划到账号复盘全流程
item.guid: 扣子-3.0-上线自媒体-Skill，覆盖选题策划到账号复盘全流程
item.description:
Kouzi 3.0 recently officially launched its professional self-media Skill, providing content creators with full-process assistance capabilities from topic planning, hot topic tracking, content generation, to account review. 扣子 3.0 近日正式上线专业自媒体 Skill，面向内容创作者提供从选题策划、热点追踪、内容生成到账号复盘的全流程辅助能力。

    In the early planning stage, creators can quickly understand hot trends across multiple platforms through features such as hot topic rankings, popular note queries, and popular WeChat official account topics;

    In the content production stage, creators can leverage content creation capabilities for platforms like Xiaohongshu and WeChat Official Accounts, transforming topics into expressions suitable for different platform styles;

    Before publishing, the forbidden word check function can also be used to reduce content risks.

    Operational capabilities such as account diagnosis, reading growth analysis, and content review are also included, helping creators identify potential topic directions from a data perspective.

item.title: 优必选情感陪伴机器人 U1 预售 10 天近 4000 台
item.guid: 优必选情感陪伴机器人-U1-预售-10-天近-4000-台
item.description:
According to National Business Daily, Ubtech's consumer humanoid robot brand "You World" has accumulated nearly 4,000 pre-orders for its first full-size bionic humanoid robot U1 series since pre-sales began on June 2nd, with total deposits exceeding ten million RMB by the evening of June 12th. 据《每日经济新闻》报道，优必选旗下消费级人形机器人品牌「优世界」首款全尺寸仿生人形机器人 U1 系列，自 6 月 2 日开启预售以来，截至 6 月 12 日晚已累计获得近 4000 台预订订单，定金总额逾千万元人民币。

The U1 series comes in two models, male and female. The male model is 183 cm tall and weighs 42 kg, while the female model is 168 cm tall and weighs 35.2 kg. U1 系列分男女两款。男款身高 183 厘米、重 42 公斤，女款身高 168 厘米、重 35.2 公斤。

Both models are equipped with 88 high-degree-of-freedom motion joints, support Wi-Fi connectivity, have a battery life of 2 to 4 hours on a single charge, feature a 'nurturing' emotional large model and local encrypted storage memory, support multi-dimensional appearance customization, have initiated IP collaborations, and are only available for purchase and use by adults. 两款机型均搭载 88 个高自由度运动关节，支持 Wi-Fi 连接，单次充电续航 2 至 4 小时，配备「养成系」情感大模型与本地加密存储记忆，支持多维度外观定制，已开启 IP 合作，且仅限成年人购买使用。

Both models are currently available for pre-order on JD.com, with a refundable deposit of 3000 yuan/unit. They are expected to be launched on June 30, with final payments starting from July 16. The specific price has not yet been announced. 目前两款机型均已在京东开启预订，定金 3000 元/台（可退），预计 6 月 30 日上市，尾款将于 7 月 16 日起支付，具体售价尚未公布。

item.title: OpenRouter 推出 Fusion，把多模型合议做成一个 API
item.guid: OpenRouter-推出-Fusion，把多模型合议做成一个-API
item.description:
Model aggregation platform OpenRouter has released Fusion, allowing users to send the same prompt in parallel to a group of models, just like calling a single model. A judge model then analyzes consensus, contradictions, blind spots, and unique information, finally synthesizing an answer. 模型聚合平台 OpenRouter 发布 Fusion，用户可以像调用单个模型一样，把同一提示并行发给一组模型，再由 judge 模型分析共识、矛盾、覆盖盲区和独特信息，最后合成答案。

The official team tested 100 tasks on the DRACO deep research benchmark. A budget panel consisting of Gemini 3 Flash, Kimi K2.6, and DeepSeek V4 Pro scored 64.7%, close to the Fable 5 single model, while costing about half. 官方在 DRACO 深度研究基准上测试了 100 个任务。由 Gemini 3 Flash、Kimi K2.6 和 DeepSeek V4 Pro 组成的预算面板得分 64.7%，接近 Fable 5 单模型，同时成本约为一半。

Fusion supports direct calls to openrouter-fusion , and also allows customization of participating models and judge models. OpenRouter claims that the entire pipeline is executed on the server side, and participating models come with web search and web fetch capabilities by default, making it suitable for research-oriented problems requiring cross-validation, blind spot coverage, and comprehensive output. Fusion 支持直接调用 openrouter-fusion ，也可以自定义参与模型和 judge 模型。OpenRouter 宣称，整个管线在服务端执行，参与模型默认带有 web search 和 web fetch 能力，适合需要交叉验证、补盲和综合输出的研究型问题。

item.title: Google 发布 Gemini-SQL2，BIRD 单模型榜单执行准确率达 80.04%
item.guid: Google-发布-Gemini-SQL2，BIRD-单模型榜单执行准确率达-80.04%
item.description:
Google Research has released Gemini-SQL2, a text-to-SQL technology. Built on Gemini 3.1 Pro, this system focuses on the ability to convert natural language questions into 'directly executable SQL queries'. Google Research 发布文本转 SQL 技术 Gemini-SQL2，该系统基于 Gemini 3.1 Pro 构建，专注于将自然语言问题转化为「可直接执行的 SQL 查询」的能力系统。

Google Research posted on X that natural language data queries face challenges such as 'complex data details and diverse business contexts'. The SQL generated by Gemini-SQL2 is not only syntactically correct but also runs successfully in databases and returns accurate results. Google Research 在 X 发文称，自然语言数据查询面临「数据细节复杂、业务上下文多样」等挑战，Gemini-SQL2 生成的 SQL 不仅语法正确，还能在数据库中成功运行并返回准确结果。

Gemini-SQL2 achieved an execution accuracy of 80.04% in the industry's mainstream evaluation benchmark BIRD single model list (Single Trained Model Track), setting a new record. Gemini-SQL2 在行业主流评测基准 BIRD 单模型榜单（Single Trained Model Track）中取得 80.04% 的执行准确率，刷新榜单纪录。

item.title: 智谱发布 ZCode 3.0，切换自研 Agent 内核
item.guid: 智谱发布-ZCode-3.0，切换自研-Agent-内核
item.description:
Zhipu AI has released its AI programming tool ZCode 3.0. The new version fully switches to the self-developed ZCode Agent kernel and is deeply adapted to GLM-5.2. 智谱发布 AI 编程工具 ZCode 3.0，新版本全面切换到自研 ZCode Agent 内核，并深度适配 GLM-5.2。

The official statement says that the new kernel has been optimized for full-fledged GLM's long-range reasoning, tool calling, and large-scale engineering execution chains. Subsequent versions will focus on the self-developed Agent experience and will no longer embed or maintain other Agent adaptations. 官方称，新内核针对满血 GLM 的长程推理、工具调用和大型工程执行链路做了优化，后续版本将聚焦自研 Agent 体验，不再内置或维护其他 Agent 适配。

ZCode 3.0 also adds features such as grouped task workspaces, Zread intelligent project knowledge base, visual Git branch graph, model usage and context occupation reminders, and multi-type attachment adaptation. ZCode 3.0 同时加入分组式任务工作区、Zread 智能项目知识库、可视化 Git 分支图谱、模型用量和上下文占用提醒、多类型附件适配等功能。

item.title: Zyphra 开源 ZONOS2，主打低延迟多语种语音合成和声音克隆
item.guid: Zyphra-开源-ZONOS2，主打低延迟多语种语音合成和声音克隆
item.description:
Zyphra has released its text-to-speech (TTS) model ZONOS2, trained using over 6 million hours of multilingual speech, targeting high-fidelity, natural voice cloning and low-latency inference. Zyphra 发布文本转语音（TTS）模型 ZONOS2，训练使用超过 600 万小时多语种语音，面向高保真、自然化语音克隆和低延迟推理。

ZONOS2 uses an MoE architecture to generate DAC tokens, and the inference process includes nemo TN standardized UTF-8 bytes and ECAPA-TDNN embedding. ZONOS2 使用 MoE 架构生成 DAC tokens，推理流程包含 nemo TN 标准化 UTF-8 bytes 和 ECAPA-TDNN embedding。

Language support is divided into three tiers: the first tier covers English, Mandarin, and Japanese; the second tier includes Korean, Russian, Italian, Portuguese, French, Spanish, Vietnamese, German, Hebrew, and Dutch. 语言支持分三档，第一档覆盖英语、普通话和日语，第二档包括韩语、俄语、意大利语、葡萄牙语、法语、西班牙语、越南语、德语、希伯来语和荷兰语。

🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/Zyphra/ZONOS2 🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/Zyphra/ZONOS2

item.title: LABUBU 世界杯联名款销量暴涨超过 30 倍
item.guid: LABUBU-世界杯联名款销量暴涨超过-30-倍
item.description:
According to Sina Tech, at the recent opening match of the 2026 FIFA World Cup in the US, Canada, and Mexico, Pop Mart's IP LABUBU appeared as a special guest, becoming the first Chinese trendy toy IP to feature in a World Cup opening ceremony. 据新浪科技报道，日前举行的 2026 年美加墨世界杯揭幕战上，泡泡玛特旗下 IP LABUBU 作为特邀嘉宾登场，成为登上世界杯开幕式的中国潮玩 IP。

The related co-branded items subsequently sparked a buying frenzy on domestic social platforms and secondary markets. According to Dahe Daily, the LABUBU 'catch the win' vinyl plush doll was launched at a price of 599 yuan. JD.com platform data shows that driven by the World Cup's popularity, LABUBU's search volume surged by 300%, and sales skyrocketed by over 30 times month-on-month. 相关联名款随后在国内社交平台和二级市场引发抢购。据大河报消息，LABUBU「catch the win」搪胶毛绒公仔发售价 599 元，京东平台数据显示，在世界杯热度的带动下，LABUBU 搜索量激增 300%，销量环比暴涨超 30 倍。

item.title: H&M 重组全球架构，大中华区降为亚太事业部下的销售市场
item.guid: H&M-重组全球架构，大中华区降为亚太事业部下的销售市场
item.description:
According to 36Kr, H&M is advancing a global organizational restructuring: 据 36 氪报道，H&M 正在推进全球组织架构调整：

    The original 9 geographically divided regional business segments have been broken up and re-divided into 26 sales markets, which are then grouped into 4 newly established continental business units based on market performance;

    The Greater China region has been downgraded to one of 26 sales markets in this round of adjustments, falling under the management of the newly established Asia-Pacific continental business unit.

Former Greater China President Si Yide is expected to serve as the Managing Director of the Asia-Pacific Business Unit, with the new structure planned to be implemented on July 1. 36Kr reported that the local Greater China team simultaneously laid off over 40 people, approximately one-quarter of its original size; the Asia-Pacific Business Unit also oversees sales markets such as Southeast Asia, Northeast Asia, India, Australia, and New Zealand, with its headquarters remaining in Shanghai. 原大中华区总裁司懿德预计将出任亚太事业部董事总经理，新架构计划 7 月 1 日落地。36氪称，大中华区本地团队同步裁员 40 余人，约为原有规模的四分之一；亚太事业部还管辖东南亚、东北亚、印度、澳大利亚和新西兰等销售市场，总部仍设在上海。

The adjustment comes against a backdrop of sluggish growth for the H&M brand. The report mentioned that the group's operating profit margin rose to 8.1% in fiscal year 2025, the highest since 2018, but sales in local currency only grew by 2%, and declined by 3% in Swedish Kronor. Stores in the Chinese mainland market have shrunk from a peak of over 500 in 2019 to approximately 300. 调整背景是 H&M 品牌增长迟滞。报道提到，2025 财年集团营业利润率升至 8.1%，为 2018 年以来最高，但本币口径销售仅增长 2%，按瑞典克朗计下滑 3%。中国内地市场门店则从 2019 年巅峰期的 500 余家收缩至约 300 家。

item.title: 《X 战警 97》第二季定档 7 月 1 日 Disney+ 开播
item.guid: 《X-战警-97》第二季定档-7-月-1-日-Disney+-开播
item.description:
Marvel animated series "X-Men '97" Season 2 has released a new trailer and poster, featuring more characters. This season is confirmed to premiere exclusively on Disney+ on July 1, with a total of 9 episodes released weekly. 漫威动画剧集《X 战警 97》第二季发布全新预告和海报，更多角色登场。该季已确认 7 月 1 日在 Disney+ 独播，共 9 集，以每周更新形式上线。

Season 2's plot continues from the end of Season 1, with the mutant team scattered across different timelines: Jean Grey and Cyclops are trapped in the future world of 3960 AD, while Professor X, Magneto, Rogue, Nightcrawler, and others are sent to ancient Egypt around 3000 BC. 第二季剧情延续第一季结尾，变种人队伍被分散到不同时间线：琴・葛雷与镭射眼被困在公元 3960 年的未来世界，X 教授、万磁王、小淘气、蓝魔鬼等则被送往约公元前 3000 年的古埃及。

item.title: YouTube 调整分发和变现，AI 低质无脸频道收入下滑
item.guid: YouTube-调整分发和变现，AI-低质无脸频道收入下滑
item.description:
The Hollywood Reporter reported that YouTube has strengthened its content policies and algorithm adjustments following the popularization of AI video tools, leading to a significant drop in income for a group of "faceless creators" who don't show their faces and rely on mass-produced material. The Hollywood Reporter 报道，YouTube 在 AI 视频工具普及后加强内容政策和算法调整，一批不露脸、依赖批量化素材制作的 faceless creators 收入明显下降。

Craig Billings of the science channel Doctor NOS stated that in the past, channels creating similar content without showing faces had higher viewership, but now many such channels have been demonetized. 科学频道 Doctor NOS 的 Craig Billings 表示，过去做相似内容但不露脸的频道观看量更高，现在不少同类频道被取消变现。

Noah Morris, who operates six faceless channels, said that some creators have started hiring low-cost hosts to appear on camera to reduce the risk of being deemed low-quality or repetitive content by the platform. 运营六个无脸频道的 Noah Morris 称，一些创作者开始雇佣低成本主持人出镜，以降低被平台判定为低质或重复内容的风险。

The report mentioned that after the platform's adjustments, some channels shifted from pure voice-overs and material splicing to live hosts, while others used virtual or outsourced on-screen presenters. YouTube's monetization policy still requires content to have sufficient originality, making it harder for repetitive, low-rewritten, or large-scale automatically generated content to consistently earn ad revenue. 报道提到，平台调整后，部分频道从纯配音、素材拼接转向真人主持，另一些则使用虚拟或外包出镜者。YouTube 的变现政策仍要求内容具备足够原创性，重复、低改写或大规模自动生成内容更难稳定获得广告分成。

item.title: 派拉蒙 1100 亿美元收购华纳兄弟获批
item.guid: 派拉蒙-1100-亿美元收购华纳兄弟获批
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, the U.S. Department of Justice announced it has concluded its antitrust investigation into Paramount's Skydance Media's $110 billion acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery, determining that the deal is "unlikely" to harm consumer interests or affect the competitive landscape of the film and television industry, and stated that it would not require any conditional modifications to the transaction. 据彭博社报道，美国司法部宣布，已结束对派拉蒙 Skydance 公司以 1100 亿美元收购华纳兄弟探索公司一案的反垄断调查，认定该交易「不太可能」损害消费者利益或影响影视行业竞争格局，并表示不要求双方对交易作出任何条件性修改。

The Justice Department stated in its announcement, "All investigative work points to the same conclusion: the film and television industry is highly dynamic, and this proposed transaction is unlikely to harm competition or the interests of American consumers." The agency's review of the deal lasted approximately eight months. 司法部在声明中称，「所有调查工作均指向同一结论：影视行业高度动态，本次拟议交易不太可能损害竞争或美国消费者利益。」该机构对这笔交易的审查历时约八个月。

This merger will integrate two major Hollywood studios, while also involving CNN and CBS, two major news networks; HBO and Paramount+, two major streaming platforms; and dozens of cable TV channels under their umbrellas. 此次合并将整合两家好莱坞主要制片厂，同时涉及 CNN 与 CBS 两大新闻网络、HBO 与 Paramount+ 两大流媒体平台，以及旗下数十个有线电视频道。
